title: Online Sessions
tagline: The same depth of presence — delivered from wherever you are.
description1: Placeholder — describe how online sessions work. What platform do you use? How is the experience adapted for video? What works especially well in the online format?
description2: Address any common concerns — does the depth of somatic or coaching work translate online? What do you do to create safety and presence across a screen?
whoIsThisFor: A quiet, private space. A good internet connection. A device with a camera and microphone. And an open, curious mind — everything else, we create together.
